title: L&T Realty Advisory Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: L&T Realty Advisory Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at L&T Realty Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About L&T Realty Advisory Limited:
L&T Realty Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty Advisory Limited!
